description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript Promises, testing practical coding ability, debugging skills, and understanding of asynchronous concepts. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering hints and encouraging hands‑on experimentation in the browser console. The tone is supportive and engaging, inviting learners to try the code, seek hints, and share their experience on social media.
Topics: JavaScript Promises, asynchronous programming, promise chaining, error handling with .catch, async/await basics, browser console debugging
Audience: Web developers and JavaScript learners with basic syntax familiarity who want to deepen their async programming skills.
